description_long: This is a modern, two-story house with a flat roof and clean, geometric lines. The front facade features large windows, a prominent balcony with metal railings, and a garage door on one side. The rear of the house opens onto a spacious patio area with a swimming pool, lounge chairs, and a covered outdoor seating area. The upper level includes a rooftop terrace with additional railings, providing ample outdoor space. The exterior is finished in white with gray accents, and the property is set on a tiled base that mimics a paved urban lot. The overall design emphasizes open, airy spaces and contemporary architectural elements.
description: A modern, two-story white house with flat roofs, large windows, balconies, and a backyard pool area. The design is clean and geometric, with ample outdoor living spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, garage door, and upper balcony with railings.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the house, the extended balcony, and a glimpse of the backyard pool and covered seating area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the swimming pool, lounge chairs, covered patio, and large windows facing the backyard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the house's side wall, the pool, and the covered outdoor area.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and balcony doors
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a wide door with sidelights, no steps, and a minimalist overhang, flanked by large windows and a garage door.
